metadata.description: Autonomous sprint driver for Claude Code. ONE goal, ONE click, then walk away. Bounded retries (max 3 per task) with Reflexion-style failure-as-observation recovery. Auto-commit per task. Always exits with something — partial PR or full PR. Zero mid-run gates.

plugins.description: /agent-pipeline-claude:run takes one goal, drafts a scope contract, fires ONE AskUserQuestion modal (GO/REVISE/BLOCK), then runs an autonomous loop: for each task — spawn worker subagent → plan + implement + self-verify → auto-commit on passes / retry with prior_failure_observation on fails (max 3 attempts, Reflexion pattern) / escalate on blocked. After all tasks: integration suite → push branch → open PR. Zero mid-run gates. Operator-only PR merge.
plugins.name: agent-pipeline-claude
